description: We use nexla to integrate data from different carriers and data sources with our platform. Nexla helps us to transform data in different format to a standardized format which helps us make new data integration more efficient.
author: Jibin T.
pros: Nexla has provided UI for creating mappers for defining the rules for data transformation, which helps non technical members also to define the rules easily. With nexla its really easy to integrate data from different carriers and data sources with our platform. Ability to forward mapper third party API response to our platform. Ability to make multiple synchronous api calls and map each request and response. Good alerting and monitoring framework. Super responsive team.
cons: There are few bugs and improvements need to be fixed but team nexla is working aggressively on it.

review_title: ETL, Automation, and technical support for a Short Rail Company
description: I was very hesitant to work with a brand new ETL tool because we have existing relationships with other ETL tools but Nexla fits very unique use cases where more than a simple extract and load process is required. It was very useful to get lightly transformed data in our destination with no risk of pipeline breakage. Being able to write back to NetSuite really differentiated the product and was a key component for an invoice automation process that led to significant price savings on tool discontinuation.
author: Sam S.
pros: Their team is happy to support and work with you to make sure any project gets over the line. The tool is extremely flexible and works with nearly any solution. The ability to integrate customize scripting into transformations was especially useful for our bespoke solution. I'm not worried about the pipelines breaking and they assisted in a key piece of automation allowing us to discontinue an entire product within the existing tech stack. The ability to write data back to systems is a feature that really differentiates the product from other competitor solutions.
cons: It's not as easy or intuitive given the customizable nature as some of the other ETL tools on the market. It does more but requires a bit more from the users. Fortunately their team was extremely supportive and willing to work with us to overcome these issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: We use Nexla data operations platform to help manage partner data integrations and monitoring
description: Quick integration with partners => Faster scaling => Higher GMV
author: Barkha S.
pros: 1. Nexla makes it really fast and easy to manage our integrations with new partners or data sources. An integration can take a little as a day. It is much faster than what we were doing before. 2. It's very easy to get up and running. Our engineers don't have to do any training or learn a new system. The Nexla takes care of any custom work our engineering team would have to do. 3. The platform manages almost any data format or source. We have used it for APIs, flat files, EDI and webhooks. They support other types too, like Avro and Parquet. 3. The support team is super responsive. We've had partner issues over the weekend and the Nexla team was on it before we even knew about it! 4. Nexla manages complicated data transformations required by our partners. We can use Nexla for API chaining, splitting and combining records, and lookups. 5. We love having the shared Slack channel. It makes support so much faster and we always know what is going on with our data with the Slack bot alerts 6. Data monitoring and error reporting is a big feature in Nexla. The email alerts help us keep track of activity and any errors detected in the data. 7. Nexla can run on any environment- the cloud, VPC, or on premise. 8. We also like the fact that it's enterprise level (i.e. provides high throughput and great support).
cons: Whenever there have been bugs the Nexla support team has been very responsive and worked quickly to resolve them. They're amazing!

review_title: Great addition to our tech systems!
description: Our experience has been great with Nexla. We have been able to off load out data pulling/pipeline processes to them and focus on our core business. Their system has solved a big headache for us.
author: Matthew C.
pros: Nexla makes it real fast and easy to ingest all types of data sources (API,FTP ect) into our data pipeline.
cons: Only small draw back is Nexla is a startup, so they don't have a robust knowledge base yet. I can only assume it is because they have been focussed on building a killer product.
author_profession: Vice President Of Finance And Operations

description: Nexla helps free up our data engineering team bandwidth.
author: Mohit B.
pros: 1. Easy to set up the ETL pipelines in just a few minutes. 2. Support team is very responsive. 3. Rigorous monitoring and error reporting.
cons: Sometimes the data processing operations are slow which slows down the business reports.

review_title: Nexla a great platform to manage and create data integrations quickly
description: It is fast to integrate new data from our partners. New features come every month, The Customer support is very helpful.
author: Javier Stevenson C.
pros: Nexla makes easy and fast connect from sources to destinations. 2. Nexla preview a sample of data to create the transformations quickly. 3. Every month the new features has a big impact in what we could do with the platform. 4. The possibilty of create the rules by coding in python is awesome. 5. The support team always listen our feedbacks and resolve our dudes and problems. 6. The information flows very quickly when nexla transform them.
cons: Nexla needs to continue improving visibility into data operations. We have also sometimes hit bugs. That said, the Nexla team is very prompt in making fixes and adding new features every month.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great team and an invaluable service
author: Shelea R.
pros: We love that Nexla makes it really easy and fast to set up new pipelines for our partners and our data sources. We are able to move quickly without having to use our internal teams to set up complicated processes-- processes that used to take us months and are difficult to get prioritized. Nexla also supports so many sources and formats; so the possibilities of how we are utilizing Nexla are endless. Also, the team is fantasitc to work with. Support is so fast and the consultation with them is priceless.
cons: It is sometimes hard to keep up with all of the features and undersranding everything the platform can do. Would love a more robust help center or guides to help with that knowledge.

author: Ben T.
pros: It's been super vital for all my data ops needs. I can't even imagine handling some of the projects I'm working on without it. Customer Support is dope, too. Data ops needs? Nexla, duh.
cons: Learning curve can be a little steep but overall not so bad.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: No meaning of Data integration without Nexla
author: Ahmad M.
pros: 1-The information transformation flows very quickly by using nexla. 2-The Customer support is very helpful. 3-Nexla supports so many sources and formats such that (API,FTP ect)
cons: Some dugs may happened, but always we found Nexla team is available to support and resolve them, the are friendly and helpful.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
